title: arctostaphylos viscida var. oblongifolia
intro: Arctostaphylos viscida var. oblongifolia, also known as greenleaf manzanita, is a shrub or small tree in the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of greenleaf manzanita include its potential to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, greenleaf manzanita can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are said to promote overall well-being and provide relief from minor ailments.
